name: Chunky Vegetable Stew with Chickpeas
recipeIngredient: 2 Celery stalks; cut into half-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large pan over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped onions and garlic; cook until softened.
3. Add the celery, carrots, parsnips, and potato; stir to combine.
4. Pour in the tomato juice and water; add marjoram, oregano, salt, and pepper.
5. Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce heat to low.
6. Cook for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Stir in the chopped parsley; increase heat slightly if desired.
8. Add the drained chickpeas and shredded cabbage (if using).
9. Simmer for an additional 10 minutes until vegetables are tender.
10. Serve hot with crusty bread or over rice.
Serves 6.
